name: hbrain
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the HBrain plugin — an agent-native second brain backed by a plain-markdown vault.

plugins.name: hbrain
plugins.description: Capture notes, tasks, decisions, facts, and links as markdown. Render Linear-style HTML views via the bundled `brain` CLI. Includes slash commands for /hbrain:timeline, /hbrain:tasks, /hbrain:capture, /hbrain:doctor, /hbrain:setup, and a SessionStart hook that auto-detects the vault and agent identity.
